summary: Full Celebrate pillar audit — mobile + desktop. Tested all CTAs, structural layout, ticket creation, BreedCakeOrderModal, and dead code. 23/23 backend tests passed. All major CTAs verified with real ticket IDs.

minor.issue: cakeModalOpen state (CelebratePageNew.jsx line 390, CelebrateMobilePage.jsx line 266) is declared and set but NEVER connected to any modal render. Dead state in both files.

ui_bugs.issue: Desktop standalone breed-cake-banner (line 517) calls setCakeModalOpen(true) instead of setBreedCakeOpen(true). Clicking the dark purple banner does NOTHING — cakeModalOpen is never rendered. Should be: onClick={() => setBreedCakeOpen(true)}
SoulMadeModal is imported on line 20 but never rendered. PersonalisedBreedSection handles it internally. Remove the import.

BirthdayCountdown returns null when pet?.birth_date is missing. Mojo has no birth_date so the component is invisible — CTA2 'Plan Party' is not testable with current test data. Confirm birth_date is populated for test pet.
cakeModalOpen state (line 266) set via BirthdayCountdown onViewCakes prop (line 454) but never renders a modal. 'View Cakes' in BirthdayCountdown would do nothing.

structural_audit_results.mobile_layout_order: PASS — DimModal → CelebrateCategoryStrip(y=387) → Tab bar(y=488) → Celebrate tab content in correct order
structural_audit_results.category_strip_outside_tabs: PASS — confirmed above tab bar (y positions verified)
structural_audit_results.pawrent_journey_collapsed: PASS — defaultCollapsed={true} confirmed, header shows '4/4 done', steps not visible until clicked
structural_audit_results.personalised_breed_section: PASS — 4 products initially, see more button, 'Made for Mojo' title, Add → opens ProductDetailModal, Soul Made dark purple card ✅
structural_audit_results.breed_cakes_mobile: PASS — setBreedCakeOpen(true) → DoggyBakeryCakeModal opens with 'A cake that looks like Mojo.' breed picker, coat variants, Oats/Ragi bases, 7 flavours (Chicken hidden for Mojo's allergy) ✅
structural_audit_results.breed_cakes_desktop_category_strip: PASS — category strip Breed Cakes opens BreedCakeOrderModal on desktop ✅
structural_audit_results.breed_cakes_desktop_standalone_banner: FAIL — breed-cake-banner uses setCakeModalOpen(true) — wrong setter, nothing opens
structural_audit_results.celebration_memory_wall_last: PASS — confirmed last element (Memory Wall content visible at page bottom)
structural_audit_results.soul_made_import_dead: CONFIRMED DEAD — SoulMadeModal imported line 20, never rendered

cta_test_results.CTA1_birthday_cakes: PASS — CelebrateContentModal opens with birthday cakes product grid
cta_test_results.CTA2_birthday_countdown_plan_party: NOT TESTABLE — Mojo has no birth_date set, BirthdayCountdown returns null
cta_test_results.CTA3_mira_bar_see_picks: PASS — Drawer opens with 'Celebrate Picks for Mojo' product grid, personalized Mira voice ✅
cta_test_results.CTA4_soul_celebration_pillars: PASS — Pillars visible (Food & Flavour, Play & Joy, Social & Friends, Adventure & Move with Mojo personality tags), expand inline on click
cta_test_results.CTA5_mira_birthday_box_build: PASS — BirthdayBoxBuilder opens 'The Mojo Birthday Box' Step 1 of 2, allergy-filtered items ✅
cta_test_results.CTA6_guided_celebrate_paths: PASS — Gotcha Day path expands inline with 5 sequential steps, 'Save Mojo's Gotcha Day →' CTA
cta_test_results.CTA7_service_grid: PASS — Service card click → ConciergeIntakeModal → tickets created: TDB-2026-1181, TDB-2026-1183 (pillar=celebrate, channel=celebrate_book) ✅
cta_test_results.CTA8_plan_with_concierge: PASS — ConciergeIntakeModal opens, Birthday selected, submitted → ticket TDB-2026-1184 (pillar=celebrate, channel=celebrate_concierge_intake_modal) ✅
cta_test_results.CTA9_pawrent_first_steps: PASS — Starts collapsed (header + chevron only), expands on click showing steps
cta_test_results.CTA10_near_me_venue: PARTIAL — Near Me tab loads with category chips (All Vendors, Pet Photographers, etc.), but no venue action buttons shown (Google Places location-dependent)

action_items: FIX HIGH: CelebratePageNew.jsx line 517 — change setCakeModalOpen(true) to setBreedCakeOpen(true) for the breed-cake-banner onClick
FIX MEDIUM: Remove dead cakeModalOpen state from CelebratePageNew.jsx (line 390) and CelebrateMobilePage.jsx (line 266) — it's never used in render
FIX MEDIUM: CelebrateMobilePage.jsx line 454 — BirthdayCountdown onViewCakes={() => setCakeModalOpen(true)} does nothing; should call setBreedCakeOpen(true) to open the breed cake modal
FIX MINOR: Remove dead import SoulMadeModal from line 20 of CelebrateMobilePage.jsx
INFO: Set birth_date for Mojo pet to verify CTA2 (BirthdayCountdown 'Plan Party' flow)
critical_code_review_comments: BUG: CelebratePageNew.jsx line 517 — breed-cake-banner onClick uses setCakeModalOpen (dead state) instead of setBreedCakeOpen. The standalone dark purple 'A cake that looks like [pet]' banner is completely broken on desktop — click does nothing.
BUG: cakeModalOpen state declared in both pages but never rendered. Both BirthdayCountdown's onViewCakes prop and the breed-cake-banner are silently broken.
DEAD CODE: SoulMadeModal import on line 20 of CelebrateMobilePage.jsx is unused — ESLint would warn about this.

success_rate.frontend: 85% (9/10 CTAs pass; 1 not testable due to missing birth_date; breed-cake-banner desktop standalone broken)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing dipali@clubconcierge.in member account with pet Mojo (Indie).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Celebrate pillar fully audited (iteration 232). Mobile layout order correct. All CTAs except CTA2 (BirthdayCountdown) verified. Key bug: desktop breed-cake-banner (line 517 CelebratePageNew.jsx) uses setCakeModalOpen instead of setBreedCakeOpen — banner click does nothing. Dead import: SoulMadeModal line 20 CelebrateMobilePage.jsx. Dead state: cakeModalOpen in both page files. Ticket creation confirmed working. Use member dipali@clubconcierge.in/test123.

breed_cake_banner_broken.root_cause: CelebratePageNew.jsx line 517: `onClick={() => setCakeModalOpen(true)}` sets a state variable (cakeModalOpen) that has no corresponding modal render in the component. The correct setter for the BreedCakeOrderModal is setBreedCakeOpen (used correctly by the category strip).
breed_cake_banner_broken.reproduction: On desktop, scroll to the dark 'A cake that looks like [pet]' standalone banner and click it — nothing happens.
breed_cake_banner_broken.additional: Also remove the cakeModalOpen/setCakeModalOpen state from both files as it's never connected to a render. And update CelebrateMobilePage BirthdayCountdown onViewCakes prop to use setBreedCakeOpen(true).
